source_refs: Project evidence: homepage About section secondary facade-detail image role
business_goal: Support trust and technical credibility with a precise architectural detail image that reinforces Rally's modern engineering positioning
visual_message: A refined, high-tech facade detail with believable geometry, restrained reflections, and strong material discipline

reference_roles.image_1: glass facade rhythm and composition reference
reference_roles.image_2: material realism and reflection behavior reference

iteration_hypothesis: A tighter facade-detail crop with strong geometry and cleaner reflections will support the About pairing better than a street-level city photo

technical_signals.aperture: f/5.6 to f/8 for facade clarity and depth control
technical_signals.light_source: clean daylight with restrained reflective behavior
technical_signals.time_of_day: late morning or late afternoon neutral daylight
technical_signals.motion_rule: still architectural detail shot with no people or traffic as subject

spatial_positioning: glass facade detail fills most of the frame
geometry and mullion rhythm remain legible in a web crop
street-level clutter stays outside the focal area
reflections support realism without turning into skyline noise
visual_standard: premium architectural facade-detail photography with corporate brand discipline
color_restriction: restrained glass, steel, concrete, and cool neutral daylight tones; avoid oversaturated sky reflections and neon tint

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: not required; composition should prioritize detail rhythm and facade clarity
composition_rule.focal_structure: one clear facade-detail focal plane with supporting reflection depth
composition_rule.camera: architectural detail photography with straightened perspective
